mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT m.biz_no) FROM u_message m WHERE m.is_deleted = 0 AND m.msg_type = #{msgType}
AND (m.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.summary LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT id, biz_no AS bizNo, msg_type AS msgType, scope, target_user_id AS targetUserId, title, summary, link_url AS linkUrl, tenant_id AS tenantId, is_deleted AS isDeleted, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt, created_by AS createdBy, updated_by AS updatedBy FROM u_message WHERE biz_no = #{bizNo} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT m.id AS messageId, m.target_user_id AS userId, u.nickname, u.email, m.created_at AS bizTime, mr.read_at AS readAt FROM u_message m LEFT JOIN u_user u ON u.id = m.target_user_id AND u.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN u_message_read mr ON mr.message_id = m.id AND mr.user_id = m.target_user_id AND mr.is_deleted = 0 WHERE m.biz_no = #{bizNo} AND m.is_deleted = 0 AND m.scope = 2 ORDER BY m.id ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM u_user WHERE is_deleted = 0
